name: Six-Hour Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a heavy roaster with a tight fitting lid.
2. Bake at 275°F for 6 hours.
3. Do not open the oven door during cooking time.
Note: I use about 5 onions and 2 quart-sized jars of canned tomatoes. This stew can also be made using chicken deboned thighs, and it is delicious even without meat.
